use_cases: Displaying multi-dimensional data comparisons in a radar/spider chart format
Comparing multiple entities across multiple attributes visually
Visualizing performance metrics or survey results across categories
Creating analytics dashboards with comparative data visualization
Showing strengths and weaknesses across multiple dimensions
ai_summary: A radar chart visualization component built with @visx that renders multi-dimensional data as a spider/radar polygon. Accepts custom data arrays and value accessors to display comparative metrics across multiple axes. Uses a warm color palette with clean SVG rendering, suitable for analytics dashboards and data comparison interfaces.
